chapter_title.en: Reward and punishment in the next world

text: ومن خطبة له (عليه السلام) قد تقدّم مختارها برواية ونذكرها هاهنا برواية أخرى لتغاير الروايتين

en.sayed-ali-raza: (This sermon has already appeared earlier but due to the difference between the two versions we have quoted it again here). Its subject is the downfall of the world and reward and punishment in the next world.
